ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mortality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mortality data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the population */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the population */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group of the population */,
  "cause_of_death_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cause of death */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths for the given category */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Total population count for the given demographic */,
  "rate_per_100k_lcl" REAL /* Lower confidence limit of the mortality rate per 100,000 population */,
  "rate_per_100k_med" REAL /* Median of the mortality rate per 100,000 population */,
  "rate_per_100k_ucl" REAL /* Upper confidence limit of the mortality rate per 100,000 population */,
  "rate_per_100k_mean" REAL /* Mean of the mortality rate per 100,000 population */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error for the mortality rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_cause_of_death_id FOREIGN KEY ("cause_of_death_id") REFERENCES causes_of_death ("cause_of_death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mortality_data_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "census_division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census division of the state */,
  "census_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the census region of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the state population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_census_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_region_id") REFERENCES census_regions ("census_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_census_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("census_division_id") REFERENCES census_divisions ("census_division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_divisions" (
  "census_division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census division */,
  "census_division_name" TEXT /* Name of the census division */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the division */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the division population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "census_regions" (
  "census_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each census region */,
  "census_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the census region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the region population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("census_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racial category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the racial category */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the race category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "causes_of_death" (
  "cause_of_death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cause of death category */,
  "cause_of_death_name" TEXT /* Name of the cause of death category */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code for the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cause_of_death_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mortality data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES mortality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-10, 11-20) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)
